title: thelypteris guadalupensis
intro: Thelypteris guadalupensis, also known as the Guadalupe fern or Guadalupe shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Thelypteris guadalupensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and promote relaxation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
